text:

    "thinking": "The optical flow data indicates a horizontal scroll to the right (magnitude 7.8) between 6044ms and 7044ms. Visually, the page content shifts to the left, bringing the 'Price summary' sidebar more clearly into view.",

    "time_start_ms": 6044,
    "time_end_ms": 7044,
    "description": "User scrolls horizontally to the right to view the price summary sidebar.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The 'Review trip' page is visible, showing flight details for Qantas and Virgin Australia. The price summary is on the right."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "A second horizontal scroll to the right is detected by optical flow (magnitude 8.3) between 12044ms and 13044ms, further centering the price summary and right-hand content.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 12044,
    "time_end_ms": 13044,
    "description": "User scrolls further to the right.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The price summary sidebar is now fully visible on the right side of the screen."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user initiates a vertical scroll down to explore the 'Add-ons' section. Although not captured in the optical flow data, the visual shift of content upwards is clear in the video.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 14500,
    "time_end_ms": 17500,
    "description": "User scrolls down the page to the 'Add-ons' section.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "frame_description": "The page scrolls down to reveal the 'Baggage' and 'Seats' sections under 'Add-ons'."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The cursor tracking data shows the cursor stationary at (1219.8, 862.4) between 17544ms and 19044ms, which corresponds to the 'SELECT SEATS' button. A click is observed as the button highlights and the page begins to transition.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 18000,
    "time_end_ms": 18500,
    "description": "User clicks on the 'SELECT SEATS' button to open the seat selector.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "SELECT SEATS",
    "page_title": "Flight Centre | Opportunity for travel.",
    "page_location": "https://secure.flightcentre.com.au/AAKy9kh1/results#baggage",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is over the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button in the 'Seats' section."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Immediately after the click, a loading overlay appears. This is a side effect of the user's action and is reported as a separate UI state change.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 19650,
    "time_end_ms": 22750,
    "description": "A 'Loading seat selector' overlay with a spinner appears and then transitions to the seat map.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A white overlay with the text 'Loading seat selector' and a red animated spinner is visible."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The seat map for the first flight (SYD to MEL) is now visible. The user moves the cursor over seat 5E and pauses, indicating consideration.",
    "type": "hover",
    "time_start_ms": 34000,
    "time_end_ms": 35500,
    "description": "User hovers over seat 5E in the seat map.",
    "confidence": 0.8,
    "interaction_target": "5E",
    "frame_description": "The seat map for Flight 1 is displayed. The cursor is positioned over seat 5E."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks on seat 5E. The seat element changes state (highlights) and a modal appears.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 35500,
    "time_end_ms": 36000,
    "description": "User selects seat 5E.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "5E",
    "frame_description": "Seat 5E is highlighted in the seat map."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "As a result of clicking the seat, a selection modal appears on the right side of the seat map.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 36500,
    "time_end_ms": 37500,
    "description": "A 'Preferred Seat' modal appears with seat details and a confirmation button.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "A modal titled 'Preferred Seat' is visible, showing a price of $28.00 and a 'CONFIRM SEAT' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The cursor moves to the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the modal and the user clicks it.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 44200,
    "time_end_ms": 44800,
    "description": "User clicks 'CONFIRM SEAT' in the selection modal.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "CONFIRM SEAT",
    "frame_description": "The cursor is over the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "After confirming, the modal closes and the seat map updates to show the selected seat in green.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 45000,
    "time_end_ms": 46000,
    "description": "The selection modal closes and seat 5E is marked as selected (green) in the map.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The seat map is visible again; seat 5E is now green."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user proceeds to the next flight by clicking the 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 47500,
    "time_end_ms": 48200,
    "description": "User clicks 'NEXT FLIGHT' to select a seat for the second leg of the trip.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "NEXT FLIGHT",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the blue 'NEXT FLIGHT' button at the bottom right of the seat selector."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The loading state appears again as the system fetches the seat map for the second flight.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 49000,
    "time_end_ms": 52150,
    "description": "The 'Loading seat selector' overlay appears and then transitions to the seat map for the second flight.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The loading spinner is visible, followed by the seat map for Flight 2 (MEL to SYD)."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "Optical flow detects a minor horizontal scroll (magnitude 5.2) as the second seat map loads.",
    "type": "scroll",
    "time_start_ms": 51544,
    "time_end_ms": 52544,
    "description": "Minor horizontal scroll adjustment.",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "The seat map for Flight 2 is loading."
  },

    "time_end_ms": 62500,
    "description": "User hovers over seat 5E for the second flight.",

  },
  {

    "confidence": 1.0,

    "frame_description": "Seat 5E is highlighted."
  },

    "time_start_ms": 63500,
    "time_end_ms": 64500,

    "confidence": 1.0,
    "frame_description": "The selection modal is visible over the seat map."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The user clicks 'CONFIRM SEAT' in the modal.",

    "time_end_ms": 68800,
    "description": "User confirms the seat selection for the second flight.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "CONFIRM SEAT",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "With both seats selected, the button at the bottom right now reads 'DONE'. The user clicks it to finish seat selection.",
    "type": "click",
    "time_start_ms": 71200,
    "time_end_ms": 71800,
    "description": "User clicks 'DONE' to exit the seat selector.",
    "confidence": 1.0,
    "interaction_target": "DONE",
    "frame_description": "The cursor clicks the blue 'DONE' button."
  },
  {
    "thinking": "The seat selector closes and the page returns to the main trip review view, now reflecting the selected seats.",
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 72000,
    "time_end_ms": 75000,
    "description": "The seat selector closes and the 'Review trip' page is updated with the selected seat information.",
